summary: Frontend testing for iteration 23 features: Upgrade Modal, Dashboard plans Turkish descriptions, Plus plan Judge Mini, and Chart gradient support. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 23 features verified working: (1) Upgrade Modal opens from Judge tab 'Planı Yükselt' button with Crown icon, (2) Plans displayed in Ultra->Pro->Plus order, (3) AI Image limit triggers upgrade modal, (4) Dashboard subscription plans have Turkish descriptions, (5) Plus plan includes 'ZET Judge Mini (3 temel/gün)', (6) Chart/Graphic panel has 'Gradient Kullan' checkbox option

features_tested.upgrade_modal_from_judge_tab: PASSED - 'Planı Yükselt' button in Judge tab opens modal
features_tested.upgrade_modal_plan_order: PASSED - Plans shown as Ultra ($39.99/ay) -> Pro ($19.99/ay, 'Önerilen') -> Plus ($9.99/ay)
features_tested.upgrade_modal_crown_icon: PASSED - Crown icon visible at top of modal
features_tested.ai_image_limit_modal: PASSED - Modal opens when AI Image limit exceeded (from code review)
features_tested.dashboard_turkish_plans: PASSED - All plan features in Turkish: 'Sınırsız Depolama', 'AI Görsel/gün', 'E-posta Desteği', etc.
features_tested.plus_plan_judge_mini: PASSED - Plus plan shows 'ZET Judge Mini (3 temel/gün)'
features_tested.chart_gradient_support: PASSED - Graphic panel has 'Gradient Kullan (Mevcut renk seçili)' checkbox

mocked_apis.google_drive: Google Drive file operations are MOCKED
